text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooosh!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! I can't even see where that landed, you
made it fly so far!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whatcha think? Nothing like a relaxing afternoon
on the course, amirite?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. This is really good for strengthening the
core, too! But I have to say...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's amazing how far you were able to hit that ball.
You must've practiced a lot to get that good.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Thanks! Real talk though, I literally just got the hang of it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I don't even know why. I haven't gotten any new
clubs or anything. Honestly, I've spent more time
working with my trainer than anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I have good core strength? Well, I have been golfing for a long time... Guess that's working out well for me.
choice_data_list:
You should utilize your core strength to
improve your running form.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hm, okay. If I do that, I bet I'll be able to run
more smoothly...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I like the sound of that! I've so not been feeling my races lately. I just feel super tired and dull during the second half of them!
choice_data_list:
Let's try to find ways to make racing even more
fun for you, then!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Next thing I know, Trainer's whipped up a new
training regime just for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: And get this... The whole schedule's not based on training theories or whatevs, but on my feelings and what I want.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that, it's easier for me to hang in there
and keep going. Heh! How's that for makin'
strides?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So your trainer's boosting your motivation by
maximizing on your strengths, huh? Sounds like a
great environment to be in. By the way...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Have you noticed how you've basically
been gushing about your trainer this entire time?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What? Me? Gushing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Omigosh, that? Nooo, I wasn't gushing at all! I was just pointing out how awesome my trainer is!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I dunno how to put it, but my trainer's just super
special to me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, okay, that really does make it sound like
I'm gushing. Welp! I guess that's just how it is,
then!
